issues.title: OpenAI added new field named "accepted_prediction_tokens"
issues.body:
**Bug description**

> Unrecognized field "accepted_prediction_tokens" (class org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$Usage$CompletionTokenDetails), not marked as ignorable (one known property: "reasoning_tokens"])

when trying to **OpenAiChatModel.call()** method

I think it need to add @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)
on
org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi.Usage.CompletionTokenDetails
